name: Cauliflower Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook cauliflower according to package directions.
2. In a bowl, combine milk, flour, egg, and 1 tablespoon oil. Add salt, pepper, and baking powder. Set aside.
3. Drain the cooked cauliflower and mash with a fork. Stir in raisins (if using).
4. Heat 3 tablespoons oil in a frying pan over medium heat.
5. When the oil is hot, spoon batter into the pan (about potato pancake size).
6. Fry until golden brown for 3 to 4 minutes on each side.
7. Serve with a pat of butter. Blot excess oil with paper towels before serving.
8. Makes about 8 fritters.
